description: An always_comb / always block that omits an output on some path, causing synthesis to infer a latch that holds stale data.
body: Failure mode: combinational logic with an if/case that does not assign every output on every branch, so synthesis infers a latch instead of pure logic, holding old values and breaking timing. Detection signals: synthesis/lint reports 'inferred latch'; output retains stale value in sim; unexpected timing path through a latch. Do not leave outputs unassigned on any branch. Safer fallback: default-assign every output at the top of always_comb or assign in all branches, add a case default, and confirm zero inferred latches.
